expectations.evidence: The response is a full SEO guidance piece titled 'How to Get Your Blog Post About Remote Team Onboarding to Rank on Google.'

expectations.text: Covers intent matching, keyword placement, structure, internal linking, and E-E-A-T
expectations.evidence: The response covers intent matching (section 1), keyword placement (sections 2 and 3), structure (section 3 on headings and meta), internal linking (section 6), and E-E-A-T (section 8).

expectations.text: Does not fabricate ranking guarantees; frames ranking as being meaningfully better than what currently ranks
expectations.evidence: Section 4 explicitly states 'your post needs to be meaningfully better — not just present' and the closing tip says 'If your post doesn't cover all of those and more, extend it before publishing.'
